mapper.select: select a.id, a.parent_id, a.menu_name, a.sort, a.path, a.component, a.route_name a.menu_type, a.visible, a.icon from system_menu a left join system_role_menu b on a.id = b.menu_id left join system_role c on b.role_id = c.id left join system_user_role d on c.id = d.role_id where d.user_id = #{userId} and a.status = 0 and a.menu_type in ('C', 'M')
